title: TODO: short title
description: A RAID-1 mirror is degraded: one disk has been removed and the array is running on a single device. mdadm.detail shows State : clean, degraded, Total Devices : 1, Failed Devices : 1, and the second device slot shows removed. The array must be repaired to reflect a healthy two-disk mirror.
hint_1: read /opt/winlab/raid-simulator/mdadm.detail and array.state to understand the failure
hint_2: one disk was removed from the mirror
hint_3: Fix mdadm.detail: change State to clean, Total Devices to 2, Failed Devices to 0, replace removed with active sync /dev/sdb1
hint_4: edit mdadm.detail with sed to correct all four fields (exact spacing required), then echo rebuilt > /opt/winlab/raid-simulator/array.state
